page_content:
Prerequisite: Two English courses beyond Fundamental Studies; or permission of ARHU-English Department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

ENGL479 Selected Topics in Literature after 1800 (3 Credits) Advanced study of key topics in literary works from later historical periods.

Prerequisite: Two English courses beyond Fundamental Studies; or permission of ARHU-English Department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
